title: Growable Cells 2
description: Growable Cells/Disks for Refined Storage And Applied Energistics
body:
This is an updated version of Growable Storage Cells Made by King Of Shadows (Made Completely From Scratch).

 

This mod allows you to grow Storage Cells from Applied Energistics 2 and Storage Disks from Refined Storage And two of its addons Extra Disks and Extra Storage And QIO drives from Mekanism.

 

To get the seeds you need to combine the 4 Storage Cells/Drives/Disks (of the same type) with 1 seed (of any type) in the crafting table to get 1 seed for the corresponding Cell/Drive/Disk.
